nasb.text: Now while the sons of Israel were in the wilderness, they found a man gathering wood on the sabbath day.

esv.text: While the people of Israel were in the wilderness, they found a man gathering sticks on the Sabbath day.

cnv.text: 以色列人在曠野的時候，有一個人在安息日撿柴。

ccb.text: 以色列人在旷野的时候，发现有人在安息日捡柴，
